app.errorBody: Something unexpected happened. Restart the app and try again.

home.greetingMorning: Good morning. Ready for a focused start?
home.greetingAfternoon: Keep your momentum going this afternoon.
home.greetingEvening: Close the day with one more solid session.

timer.title: Timer
timer.subtitleLocked: Focus lock is blocking extra taps.
timer.subtitleReady: Choose a mode and start your next session.
timer.completionBreakBody: Start your next focus block when ready.
timer.alertFocusBody: Take a short break and come back ready.
timer.alertBreakBody: Break is over. Time to focus again.
timer.memoPlaceholder: What are you focusing on right now?

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.noHistoryBody: Start a timer to build your first chart.
statistics.trendEmptyBody: before the monthly trend can appear.
statistics.shareDesc: Share today's progress with the system share sheet, or copy it when sharing is unavailable.
statistics.shareText: Today I completed {{minutes}} focused minutes across {{sessions}} sessions! #FocusTimer
statistics.shareCopied: Sharing is not supported here, so the result was copied.
statistics.shareUnavailable: This device cannot share the result right now.

goal.title: Daily Goal
goal.coachSmall: Start small and build consistency. A one-hour target is a great baseline.
goal.coachSteady: One to two hours is a realistic target for steady daily improvement.
goal.coachBalanced: Two to three hours works well when you can plan breaks between sessions.
goal.coachStructured: Three to four hours needs structure. Break it into blocks and protect your rest.
goal.coachBig: That is a big target. Use several Pomodoro rounds and make recovery time part of the plan.
goal.guideLine1: Focus for 25 minutes, then rest for 5 minutes.
goal.guideLine2: This rhythm helps you stay engaged without burning out, especially when the goal gets larger.
goal.guideLine3: A goal of {{goal}} is about {{sessions}} focus sessions.

login.subtitle: Keep your focus records in sync and continue studying across devices.
login.notice: If you skip login, data will stay only on this device.

memoInput.title: What did you work on?
memoInput.description: Capture one quick note for the session you just finished.
memoInput.placeholder: Write a short memo about what you studied...

memoScreen.title: Session memos
memoScreen.subtitle: Browse and search notes from completed focus sessions.
memoScreen.empty: No memos yet. Finish a focus session and save your first note.

streak.celebration: Streak unlocked: {{count}} days in a row. Keep the momentum going.
